page_title: Refrain, The Songs Were Inspired by Evangelion
text:
~refrain~ The songs were inspired by "EVANGELION" is an album consisting of songs from and based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It was composed by Hidetoshi Sato, Toshiyuki Ohmori, Bart Howard, Tony Orly and Yoko Takahashi. The album was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICA-378 and was released on 06 November 1997. http://vgmdb.net/album/22651 

All songs are performed by Yoko Takahashi, track 14 being an exception, which was recorded on the streets of London by street singers. It was produced by Toshiyuki Ohmori.
